name: Network Patcher
description: Runs after build_network() and before optimize(). Logs network topology stats and optionally enforces a minimum p_nom_min of 0 on all generators and warns about zero-capacity non-extendable generators.

fix_negative_p_nom_min.label: Fix negative p_nom_min
fix_negative_p_nom_min.description: Clamp any generator with p_nom_min < 0 to 0. Negative values are physically invalid for dispatchable units and can cause solver infeasibility.

warn_zero_capacity.label: Warn zero-capacity generators
warn_zero_capacity.description: Log a warning for any non-extendable generator with p_nom = 0 — these contribute nothing to the model and are often data-entry errors.
